prompt: A black-and-white pencil line drawing landscape. Rolling mountain ranges stretch into the distance, their contours rendered with flowing hatched lines. Dense forests are represented by rhythmic repeating line strokes covering the slopes. A winding path weaves through the woodland toward the background. In the far distance, a small ornate castle with pointed spires is faintly visible among clouds, suggested by minimal outlines. White background with no color, purely ink-on-paper aesthetic. To the right, beyond the visible tree line, the mountain slopes descend into a sketched river valley with a stone bridge. To the left, a cluster of ancient gnarled trees and a rocky cliff face emerge from the forest canopy. The path ahead gradually ascends toward the castle through increasingly dense woodland. First-person viewer. First-person perspective, elevated viewpoint looking forward along the winding path into the mountainous distance. No character body visible.

scene_adherence.visible_part: This is a black-and-white pencil line drawing landscape with a white background and no color, featuring a purely ink-on-paper aesthetic. Rolling mountain ranges stretch into the distance, their contours rendered with flowing hatched lines. Dense forests are represented by rhythmic repeating line strokes covering the slopes. A winding path weaves through the woodland toward the background. In the far distance, a small ornate castle with pointed spires is faintly visible among clouds, suggested by minimal outlines.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: To the right, beyond the visible tree line, the mountain slopes descend into a sketched river valley with a stone bridge. To the left, a cluster of ancient gnarled trees and a rocky cliff face emerge from the forest canopy. The path ahead gradually ascends toward the castle through increasingly dense woodland.
